theme.description: An authoritative, clean, and function-first design language prioritizing clarity during emergencies. High contrast text, minimal decorative elements, and strict color-coding for severity.

layout_and_spacing.mobile_container: max-w-md mx-auto h-screen relative bg-gray-50 shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden (PWA/Mobile pattern)
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding: p-4, p-6 for cards. Gap-4 for mobile grids, gap-6 for dashboard bento grids.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for action buttons, rounded-none for full-bleed maps.

sos_button.style: Massive rounded-full button (e.g., h-40 w-40), centered, bg-red-500 text-white shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(239,68,68,0.4)]. Should have a subtle pulse animation on ring.

bento_cards.style: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl shadow-sm p-6 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow.
bento_cards.usage: Dashboard metrics and mobile main menu items.

status_badge.style: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center gap-1
status_badge.variants: Critical -> bg-red-100 text-red-700; Warning -> bg-amber-100 text-amber-700; Safe -> bg-green-100 text-green-700

bottom_nav.style: absolute bottom-0 w-full bg-white border-t border-gray-200 pb-safe pt-2 px-6 flex justify-between items-center z-50 shadow-[0_-4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]

inputs.style: bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-800 focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle -translate-y-0.5 and shadow-md for interactive cards.
motion_and_interactions.active: Scale-95 on buttons to give tactile feedback.
motion_and_interactions.pulse: Use framer-motion or tailwind animate-pulse for the SOS button ring.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Slide up for modals (Incident Report), fade for tab switches.

icons.guidelines: Use stroke-width 2 or 2.5 for a solid, legible feel. Size 24px for nav, 32px+ for bento cards.

auth_background.description: Atmospheric, cinematic blurred night city scape with emergency lights. Use as full bleed background on Login/Register with a heavy dark gradient overlay (bg-black/60) to ensure text legibility.

brand_logo.description: Urban Intel minimalist shield/map pin logo. Use in headers, splash screen, and auth forms.

dashboard_map.description: High-contrast dark map texture with glowing spots. Use as the massive map background in the Admin Dashboard view. Overlay UI cards on top of it.

avatar_placeholder.description: Professional headshot for the user profile section.

incident_photo_dummy.description: Dummy image for incident reports (Building engulfed in flames).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application as a responsive web app. For the 'Mobile Citizen' views, simulate a mobile experience by constraining the main container (e.g., 'max-w-md mx-auto h-screen shadow-2xl relative') so it looks like a phone UI on desktop, or fills the screen on mobile devices.
For the 'Admin Dashboard' view, use a full-width desktop layout (grid-cols-12).
Use standard Shadcn components for forms, tabs, and tables, but strip away excess borders to match the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' clean look.
The Home screen must feature the SOS button prominently at the top/center, followed by a 'Bento Grid' for other actions (Report, History, Profile).
Implement the 'Report Incident' flow as a multi-step modal or stacked views with progressive disclosure.
Ensure all severity statuses (Low, Medium, High) use the exact color hexes defined in this guideline.
Use pure white cards on an off-white (#F8F9FA) background to establish depth without relying on heavy shadows.
Implement bottom navigation for the mobile citizen view.
All interactive elements MUST include 'data-testid' attributes for testing.
